TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma inni as'aluka-l-huda wa-t-tuqa wa-l-'afafa wa-l-ghina.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika mina-l-hammi wa-l-hazan wa-l-'ajzi wa-l-kasal.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety, sorrow, incapacity, and laziness.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, help me in remembering You, in being grateful to You, and in worshipping You in an excellent manner.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِي رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Rabbi ij'alni muqima-s-salati wa min dhurriyyati rabbana wa taqabbal du'a.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and [many] from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama sallayta 'ala Ibrahima.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ (x3) اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Astaghfiru-llah (x3). Allahumma Anta-s-Salam, wa minka-s-salam, tabarakta ya Dha-l-Jalali wa-l-Ikram.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: I seek the forgiveness of Allah (x3). O Allah, You are The Flawless and The Source of Peace, and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, full of Majesty and Honour.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ اللَّهُمَّ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَلَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَلَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: La ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadir. Allahumma la mani'a lima a'tayta wa la mu'tiya lima mana'ta wa la yanfa'u dhal-jaddi minkal-jadd.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: There is no god but Allah. He is Alone and has no partner. To Him belong sovereignty and praise. He is over all things All-Powerful. O Allah, there is none who can withhold what You give, and none who can give what You withhold; and the wealth of the wealthy avails them not against You.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: La ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadir. La hawla wa la quwwata illa bi-llah.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: There is no god but Allah. He is Alone and has no partner. To Him belong sovereignty and praise. He is over all things All-Powerful. There is no power or strength except through Allah.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ (×33) الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ (×33) اللهُ أَكْبَرُ (×33) لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Subhana-llah (x33), Alhamdu-llilah (x33), Allahu Akbar (x33). La ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadir.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Glory be to Allah (x33). All praise is due to Allah (x33). Allah is the Greatest (x33). There is no god but Allah. He is alone, with no partner. To Him belong all sovereignty and all praise. He is over all things All-Powerful.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللهُ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. Lahu ma fi-s-samawati wa ma fi-l-ard.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth.
TEXT.REFERENCE: Nasā'ī in 'Amal al-Yawm 100 — recite after each obligatory prayer

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: قُلْ هُوَ اللهُ أَحَدٌ (Surah Al-Ikhlas) • قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ (Surah Al-Falaq) • قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ (Surah An-Nas)
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Qul Huwa-llahu Ahad... Qul a'udhu bi Rabbi-l-falaq... Qul a'udhu bi rabbi-n-nas...
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas after each obligatory prayer.
TEXT.REFERENCE: Abu Dawud 1523 — 'Uqbah bin 'Amir reported the Prophet ﷺ commanded reciting al-Mu'awwidhatayn after every prayer.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلهِ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: We have entered the morning and the entire sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is none worthy of worship except Allah, Alone, without partner.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika masta-ta'tu.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, You are my Lord. There is no deity except You. You created me and I am Your servant. I am upon Your covenant and promise to the best of my ability.
TEXT.REFERENCE: Bukhari 6306 — Master of Istighfar; whoever says it in the morning with conviction and dies that day will be of the people of Jannah.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلهِ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa Huwa 'ala kulli shay'in Qadir.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: We have entered the evening and the entire sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no deity except Allah, Alone with no partner. To Him belongs all dominion and praise, and He is powerful over all things.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma qini 'adhabaka yawma tab'athu 'ibadak.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Alhamdu lillahi-lladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhi-n-nushur.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: All praise is due to Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us, and unto Him is the resurrection.

English.TITLE: Dua for Entry into the Masjid

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma-ftah li abwaba rahmatik.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, I ask of You from Your bounty.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: بِسْمِ اللهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Bismillah, tawakkaltu 'ala-llah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa bi-llah.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: In the Name of Allah. I place my trust in Allah. There is no power or strength except through Allah.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ وَاشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma Rabbi-n-nas, adhhib-il-ba's, washfi, anta-sh-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uka, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah! Lord of mankind! Remove this disease and cure. You are the Great Curer. There is no cure but through You, which leaves behind no disease.

English.TITLE: Dua for Forgiveness of All Sins

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ عَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma-ghfir li dhanbi kullahu diqqahu wa jillahu wa awwalahu wa akhirahu wa 'alaniyatahu wa sirrahu.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, forgive all of my sins: the small and great, the first and the last, the public and the private.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ آتِ نَفْسِي تَقْوَاهَا وَزَكِّهَا أَنْتَ خَيْرُ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا أَنْتَ وَلِيُّهَا وَمَوْلَاهَا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma ati nafsi taqwaha wa zakkiha anta khayru man zakkaha anta waliyyuha wa mawlaha.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, give my soul its taqwa (God-consciousness), and purify it, for You are the best to purify it. You are its Protector and its Guardian.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Rabbana atina fi-d-dunya hasanatan wa fi-l-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaba-n-nar.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Our Lord! Grant us the good of this world and the Hereafter, and protect us from the torment of the Fire.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj-'alna lil-muttaqina imama.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Our Lord! Grant us spouses and offspring who will be the comfort of our eyes, and give us the grace to lead the righteous.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana ba'da idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan innaka anta-l-Wahhab.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: Our Lord! Do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us. Grant us Your mercy. You are indeed the Giver of all bounties.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa 'amalan mutaqabbala.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, wholesome sustenance, and deeds which are accepted.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنِي مِنَ النَّارِ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma ajirnī mina-n-nar.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, protect me from the Hell-fire. (Recite 7 times after Maghrib and Fajr)

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Rabbi zidni 'ilma.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an wa a'udhu bika min 'ilmin la yanfa'.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge and I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit.

TEXT.ARABIC_TEXT: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
TEXT.TRANSLITERATION: Bismillahi-lladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fi-l-ardi wa la fi-s-sama'i wa Huwa-s-Sami'ul-'Alim.
TEXT.TRANSLATED_TEXT: In the Name of Allah, with Whose Name nothing is harmed on earth nor in heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. (Recite 3 times)
